_comment: Japanese-band-only mode. Sources: Spincoaster (indie/R&B/hip-hop), ROCKIN'ON JAPAN news (broader rock/live-house scene), Gekirock (rock/metal/visual-kei), BARKS (broad, but only returns ~10 latest items so its net contribution is small/inconsistent). All share a compatible “…”/「…」-for-songs, 『』-for-albums convention. excludeKeywords is a best-effort nationality filter (see README). excludeArtists is a manual safety net for major-label/veteran/idol acts that slip through (either because they still match the release-announcement format, or because the YouTube search fallback occasionally attaches the wrong channel's stats and skews the buzz ratio).
